name: Nikolaus Harnoncourt
abstract: Johann Nikolaus Harnoncourt (6 December 1929 – 5 March 2016) was an Austrian conductor, known for his historically informed performances. He specialized in music of the Baroque period, but later extended his repertoire to include Classical and early Romantic works.

about_quotes.speaker: Chick Corea
about_quotes.evidence: We met in this room... with Gulda to rehearse the concerto with the conductor... he was a very sweet man... And we recorded with the Concertgebouw.
about_quotes.doc_title: Chick Corea — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
